meaning: n.[矿] 黄晶,黄玉,[鸟]南美蜂鸟,透明的浅黄褐色
examples: There are five options for the gemstone: blue topaz, opalite, onyx, sapphire and ruby.
A red topaz is a rarity.
Topaz occurs in the igneous rock rhyolite.
The shoes are low heeled pumps embroidered with silver thread and adorned with topaz.
Waterfalls, craggy peaks and topaz lagoons are all part of the scenery, while abundant wildlife flourishes.
